source: Newcastle 6000 kcal benchmark 2024 ~$135/tonne (World Bank Pink Sheet) divided by 29.31 GJ/tonne LHV; forward trajectory uses Asian structural demand persistence per IEA Coal 2024 outlook
note: [scope=all_10_AMS] Coal NOT Hormuz-impacted (not shipped through Hormuz). 2026 anchor reflects current Newcastle market. Slow rise CAGR +1.1%/yr real driven by Asian demand (China + India + Vietnam + Indonesia DMO discipline). DIVERGES from IEA WEO 2025 CPS coastal China coal trajectory ($131->$105 declining) because IEA averages global demand including OECD decline; our Newcastle/HBA Asian-benchmark stays robust.
